description:
Offered: every semester
This course introduces data collection, analysis, and interpretation through descriptive statistics, regression analysis, and inferential statistics. Students will explore parameter estimation and hypothesis testing through both simulation methods and classical mathematical models. Students will write short computer programs and use statistical software to do these analyses in reproducible ways.
Prerequisite(s): Grade of 1.7 or higher in MATH 1250 or MATH 1300
Note: Credit is awarded for only one of MATH 1700 , MATH 1800 , and MATH 2800.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL
prerequisites: Grade of 1.7 or higher in MATH 1250 or MATH 1300
